resources.string:
TERMS AND CONDITIONS
 Last Updated: March 8, 2026

 Welcome to GoAndBe. By creating an account, you agree to these terms.

 1. ACCOUNT REGISTRATION
 You must provide a valid email, username, and password. You are responsible for keeping your login credentials secure.

 2. YOUR TRIPS & CONTENT
 You own the itineraries and photos you upload. By using the app, you grant us permission to store and display this content for your personal use. You are responsible for ensuring your content doesn't violate any laws.

 3. DATA STORAGE
 We aim for 100% uptime, but this app is not a permanent backup service. We are not liable for the loss of trip data or photos. Please keep copies of important travel documents elsewhere.

 4. PROHIBITED CONDUCT
 You may not attempt to hack the app, upload malicious code, or use the service for illegal activities.

 5. LIMITATION OF LIABILITY
 The app is provided "as is." We are not responsible for travel disruptions, errors in itineraries, or data loss.

 6. TERMINATION
 We reserve the right to disable accounts that violate these terms or disrupt the service.

 7. GOVERNING LAW
 These terms are governed by the laws of Spain.

ABOUT GOANDBE

 GoAndBe was created with a simple mission: to turn your travel dreams into organized realities. We believe that the best parts of travel shouldn't be buried in a messy inbox or lost in a chaotic camera roll.

 Our Vision
 Whether you're planning a local weekend getaway or a global expedition, GoAndBe provides a dedicated space to map out your journey. By combining personal itineraries with your personal travel photos, we help you build a digital scrapbook of your adventures as they happen.

 Why GoAndBe?
 • Seamless Planning: Keep your dates, locations, and notes in one easy-to-access place.
 • Visual Memories: Attach photos directly to your trip timeline so you never forget a moment.
 • Focused Experience: We keep it simple—just your trips, your photos, and your next destination.

 Thank you for letting us be a part of your journey. Keep exploring!

GoAndBe is your ultimate travel companion, designed to help you organize itineraries and preserve memories through photos. Plan your journey, document your experiences, and revisit your adventures all in one place.
Lead Developer: Your Name\nDesign: Creative Team\nSupport: support@goandbe.com
